name: pyonwater
documentation:
# pyonwater
[EyeOnWater](eyeonwater.com) client library

[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/repos/github/kdeyev/pyonwater/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://coveralls.io/github/kdeyev/pyonwater?branch=main)

The usage example:

```
"""Example showing the EOW Client usage."""

import asyncio

import aiohttp

from pyonwater import Account, Client


async def main() -> None:
    """Main."""
    account = Account(
        eow_hostname="eyeonwater.com",
        username="your EOW login",
        password="your EOW password",
    )
    websession = aiohttp.ClientSession()
    client = Client(websession=websession, account=account)

    await client.authenticate()

    meters = await account.fetch_meters(client=client)
    print(f"{len(meters)} meters found")
    for meter in meters:
        # Read meter info
        await meter.read_meter_info(client=client)
        print(f"meter {meter.meter_uuid} shows {meter.reading}")
        print(f"meter {meter.meter_uuid} info {meter.meter_info}")

        # Read historical data
        await meter.read_historical_data(client=client, days_to_load=3)
        for d in meter.last_historical_data:
            print(d)

    await websession.close()


loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
loop.run_until_complete(main())

```

methods.name: pyonwater.account.Account.fetch_meter_readers
documentation: List the meter readers associated with the account.

methods.name: pyonwater.account.Account.fetch_meters
documentation: List the meter states associated with the account.

methods.name: pyonwater.meter_reader.MeterReader.read_meter_info
documentation: Triggers an on-demand meter read and returns it when complete.

methods.name: pyonwater.meter_reader.MeterReader.read_historical_data
documentation: Retrieve historical data for today and past N days.

methods.name: pyonwater.meter_reader.MeterReader.convert
documentation: Convert the raw data into a list of DataPoint objects.

methods.name: pyonwater.meter_reader.MeterReader.read_historical_data_one_day
documentation: Retrieve the historical hourly water readings for a requested day.

methods.name: pyonwater.meter.Meter.read_historical_data
documentation: Read historical data for N last days.

methods.name: pyonwater.meter.Meter._convert_to_native
documentation: Convert data point to meters native units

methods.name: pyonwater.client.Client.request
documentation: Make API calls against the eow API.

classes.name: pyonwater.exceptions.EyeOnWaterException
documentation: Base exception for more specific exceptions to inherit from.

classes.name: pyonwater.exceptions.EyeOnWaterAuthError
documentation:
Exception for authentication failures.

Either wrong username or wrong password.

classes.name: pyonwater.exceptions.EyeOnWaterRateLimitError
documentation:
Exception for reaching the ratelimit.

Either too many login attempts or too many requests.

classes.name: pyonwater.exceptions.EyeOnWaterAuthExpired
documentation: Exception for when a token is no longer valid.

classes.name: pyonwater.exceptions.EyeOnWaterAPIError
documentation: General exception for unknown API responses.

classes.name: pyonwater.exceptions.EyeOnWaterResponseIsEmpty
documentation: API answered correct but there is not content to parse.

functions.name: pyonwater.units.deduce_native_units
documentation: Deduce native units based on oew units

functions.name: pyonwater.units.convert_to_native
documentation: Convert read units to native unit.
